query:
SELECT n.id, n.title, n.subjectId, n.semesterId, n.gradeId, n.categoryId, c.name as categoryName, s.name as subjectName, g.name as gradeName
FROM notebooks n 
JOIN content_categories c ON n.categoryId = c.id 
JOIN subjects s ON n.subjectId = s.id
JOIN grades g ON n.gradeId = g.id
WHERE n.isPublished = 1
AND (n.fileUrl IS NOT NULL OR n.previewUrl IS NOT NULL)
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ocoPq9UKt9MVUJb.root --database cF5vY7QXosm6HAcTf29xyM --execute SELECT n.id, n.title, n.subjectId, n.semesterId, n.gradeId, n.categoryId, c.name as categoryName, s.name as subjectName, g.name as gradeName
FROM notebooks n 
JOIN content_categories c ON n.categoryId = c.id 
JOIN subjects s ON n.subjectId = s.id
JOIN grades g ON n.gradeId = g.id
WHERE n.isPublished = 1
AND (n.fileUrl IS NOT NULL OR n.previewUrl IS NOT NULL)
LIMIT 10;
